---
title: "IAT Participant level analysis: main"
author: "Alexander Porshnev"
date: "12/05/2025"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
engine: julia
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=."]
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  info: false
---

<!-- this setup dependencies, but doesn't appear in the generated document -->

```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| results: "hidden" 
	using Pkg
	using CairoMakie        
	using DataFrames
	using MixedModels
	using MixedModelsMakie # diagnostic plots
	#using RCall            # call R from Julia if error run set R_HOME='*' in terminal
	using Arrow
	using StandardizedPredictors
	using BoxCox
	using LinearAlgebra
	using StatsAPI
	using StatsBase
	using CSV
	using PrettyTables
  using MixedModelsExtras
  using HypothesisTests
```
```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| results: "hidden" 
  
```


## Upload Dataset & helper print functions
```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| results: "hidden"
iat = DataFrame(Arrow.Table("../out_step_02/t_2009_top10.arrow"))

function load_ldm(ldm_name)
    return CSV.read("../in_Distances/llms_systematic/" * ldm_name * ".csv", DataFrame)
end

function init_html(file_name = "bl_render.html")
	open(file_name, "w") do io
	    show(io, "text/html", html"""<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="UTF-8" />""")
    end
end

function close_html(file_name = "bl_render.html")
	open(file_name, "a") do io
	    show(io, "text/html", html"""</html>""")
  end
end

function print_html(smth, file_name = "bl_render.html")
   print(smth)
   open(file_name, "a") do io
	    show(io, MIME("text/html"), smth)
	 end
   #pretty_table(smth; backend = :markdown, alignment=:c)
end

function OutTable(df, file_name = "bl_render.html")
  open(file_name, "a") do io
        pretty_table(io, df; backend = :html, alignment=:c)
	end
	pretty_table(df, backend = :html, alignment=:c)
end

function OutModel(m_prec, m_next, file_name = "bl_render.html",  print_lltest= 1)
	print_html(m_next, file_name)
    if print_lltest == 1 
	 	print_html(MixedModels.likelihoodratiotest(m_prec, m_next), file_name)
    end
	
	return 1
end

function MakeFormula(baseline, dist_name)
 return eval(Meta.parse("@formula(" * baseline * " + " * dist_name * ")"))
end



init_html()
```
# Formula
compare to baseline:
baseline = "RT ~
1 + age + birth_sex + countryres 
+ Length + NSyll + logBNC
+ change + Order + after_error 
+ trial_number 
 + (1 | subj) + (1|trial_name)"
 

```{julia}
#= distances=["cos_subtitles_skipgram_50_r3","cos_subtitles_skipgram_100_r5","cos_subtitles_skipgram_50_r5","cos_subtitles_skipgram_50_r10"],"cos_subtitles_skipgram_100_r10","subtitles_conditional_probability_ngram_None_r10","subtitles_conditional_probability_ngram_None_r3","subtitles_log_ngram_None_r10","subtitles_conditional_probability_ngram_None_r5","subtitles_log_ngram_None_r5","cos_llama_2_7b_Q8_0_pairs_names_Upper","cos_llama_7b_Q8_0_pairs_names_Upper","cos_llama_65b_Q5_0_pairs_names_Upper","cos_dolphin_2_8_mistral_7b_v02_Q8_0_pairs_names_Upper","cos_Mistral_7B_v0_3_Q8_0_pairs_names_Upper","cos_subtitles_probability_ratios_None_r10","cos_subtitles_probability_ratios_None_r5","cos_bnc_log_cooccurrence_None_r3","cos_ukwac_conditional_probability_None_r1","cos_bnc_log_cooccurrence_None_r5"]=#

baseline = "RT ~
1 + age + birth_sex + countryres 
+ Length + NSyll + logBNC
+ change + Order + after_error 
+ trial_number 
 + (1 | subj) + (1|trial_name)"
```

```{julia}
#| echo: false

m_bl = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
      form = eval(Meta.parse("@formula(" * baseline * ")"))
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end
```

```{julia}
ldm_name = "cor_dolphin-2.8-mistral-7b-v02-Q8_0_pairs_names_Upper"

dist_ldm =load_ldm(ldm_name) #distances[1]

dist_ldm = transform(dist_ldm, :"First word" => ByRow(passmissing(lowercase)) => :"First word")
dist_ldm[!, "stimuli_join"] = (string.(dist_ldm[!, "First word"], "_", dist_ldm[!, "Second word"]))
df1 = innerjoin(iat, dist_ldm, on = :stimuli_join) #, renamecols = "_left" => "_right"
```      

```{julia}
m_ldm = let levels = ["m", "f", "n"]
  form = MakeFormula(baseline , "ldm")
  contrasts = Dict(
    :birth_sex => HypothesisCoding(
      [
         1/2  0  -1/2
         0  1/2 -1/2
      ];
      levels,
      labels=["m", "f"],),
      :countrycit => SeqDiffCoding(),
      :age => Center(24), #centered to median
      :Length => Center(6),
      :NSyll => Center(2)
   )
    fit(MixedModel, form, iat; contrasts)
end

OutModel(m_ldm,m_bl,"bl_render.html",1)
```


## Summary of BICs
# Coefficients:
```{julia}
#| echo: false
print(fixef(m_bl))
#print(fieldnames(typeof(m_bl)))
#print(m_bl.σ)

#var_fe = var_fe = var(predict(m_ldm, type=:fixed))

#var_re = sum(abs2, m_bl.σ)
#println(var_re)
#var_res = abs2(m_bl.σ[end])

```
# R2 F2
```{julia}
r2_bl_marginal = r2(m_bl; conditional = false)
r2_bl_conditional = r2(m_bl; conditional =  true)

r2_ldm_marginal = r2(m_ldm; conditional = false)
r2_ldm_conditional = r2(m_ldm; conditional =  true)

f2 = (r2_ldm_conditional - r2_bl_conditional)/(1 - r2_ldm_conditional)

```
# Cor
```{julia}
#dfCor = select(iat,[:"RT",:"ldm"])
cor_RT_ldm = cor(iat[!, "RT"], iat[!,"ldm"])
ct = CorrelationTest(iat[!, "RT"], iat[!,"ldm"])

ci = confint(ct)
lower_bound = ci[1]
upper_bound = ci[2]
print(cor_RT_ldm, lower_bound, upper_bound )
#round(lower_bound,sigdigits = 3)
```

```{julia}
modelStats = DataFrame([ (param ="m_bl: Baseline ", value = bic(m_bl)),
						(param ="m_ldm: m_bl+ldm", value = bic(m_ldm)),
						(param = "delta BIC", value = (bic(m_bl)-bic(m_ldm))),
						(param = "r2 ldm marginal", value = r2_ldm_marginal),
						(param = "r2 ldm conditional", value= r2_ldm_conditional),
						(param = "f2 conditional", value = f2),
						(param = "cor", value = cor_RT_ldm),
            (param = "CI", value = (lower_bound, upper_bound))
						])

OutTable(modelStats)
```



```{julia}
close_html()
```
